overall.description: A slow first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city alley in Night City, passing large holographic movie billboards for 'BLAST DANCE' and 'FOREIGN BODY'. The scene features neon-lit tall buildings, synthetic atmospheric lighting, and a vivid color palette characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic cyberpunk alley with holographic movie billboards

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward through the narrow alley, observing the large movie billboards and neon-lit surroundings

entered.detail: large holographic movie poster featuring action scenes with red neon title text
translucent blue inflatable architectural structure attached to the left building
pink advertisement billboard with bold text and product imagery
futuristic building with curved facade and metallic panels
tall dark building with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly through a narrow futuristic alley, dominated by a large 'BLAST DANCE' movie billboard positioned centrally. A translucent blue inflatable structure is visible on the left, while a pink 'FOREIGN BODY' billboard appears on the right. The environment is enclosed by tall cyberpunk architecture with neon lighting and no pedestrians present.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic alley between large advertisements with city views ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the alley, passing between the two large billboards

entered.detail: illuminated skyscrapers visible in the background beyond the alley
rows of lit windows on the dark building facade

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the alley, the perspective shifts as the camera moves past the billboards. The 'BLAST DANCE' billboard moves to the left side and recedes into the distance, while the 'FOREIGN BODY' billboard becomes more prominent on the right. The background reveals distant illuminated towers of the cyberpunk cityscape as the camera progresses forward through the enclosed passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a narrow cyberpunk alley that gradually opens up to reveal the distant scale of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins by gliding toward a large, centrally positioned BLAST DANCE movie billboard, flanked by a translucent blue inflatable structure on the left and a pink FOREIGN BODY billboard on the right. As the camera progresses forward, the perspective shifts, causing the BLAST DANCE display to recede into the distance on the left while the FOREIGN BODY billboard becomes more prominent on the right. The scene then expands as the camera moves past these holographic displays, transitioning from the enclosed passage toward a vista of illuminated towers and towering architecture in the background.
